name: Coda Minerals Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1450, stop A$0.1040, target A$0.1600 (0.37:1) — then trail it.
